name: lab-notebook
description: **A local lab notebook for ferroelectric oxide thin film growth and characterization.**

scripts.setup: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -q && (cp config.example.json config.json 2>/dev/null || true) && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,yellow "cd backend && .venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
